retrieved_result: Kauai remains a popular film location (Page 2 of 2)Kauai remains a popular film location Movies including this year's 'The Descendants' and 'Just Go With It,' 'Jurassic Park' and 'South Pacific' have been filmed on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.
